name: polymarket-trading-platform
description: Non-custodial Polymarket third-party base trading platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @pmx/web" "npm run dev --workspace @pmx/admin" "npm run start:dev --workspace @pmx/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pmx/contracts && npm run build --workspace @pmx/shared && npm run build --workspace @pmx/api-client && npm run build --workspace @pmx/api && npm run build --workspace @pmx/web && npm run build --workspace @pmx/admin
scripts.test: npm run test:nx-workspace && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
